inputs.name: competitors
inputs.description: Competitor sites for SERP comparison, one per line

inputs.name: target_keywords
inputs.placeholder:
project management software
task tracking tool
inputs.description: Keywords you want to rank for, one per line

inputs.name: business_type
inputs.description: Your business type — affects audit priorities

inputs.name: include_ai_search
inputs.description: Include AI search readiness checks (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity)

weekly-crawl.description: Full site crawl and technical audit every Monday at 6am. Generates an SEO Health Score (0-100) and surfaces the top issues costing you traffic.

activities.intent: Crawl the entire site to discover all pages, check status codes, and map internal links
steps: Fetch and parse robots.txt and XML sitemap
Crawl all discoverable pages and record status codes, redirects, and response times
Map internal link structure and identify orphaned pages
Check mobile usability and Core Web Vitals

activities.intent: Run on-page SEO checks across all crawled pages and flag issues
steps: Check title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, and canonical tags
Analyze content quality and E-E-A-T signals
Audit image alt text, file sizes, and format optimization
Validate structured data (JSON-LD) on all pages

activities.intent: Calculate the SEO Health Score and produce a ranked report with the top 5 fixes
steps: Calculate weighted SEO Health Score (0-100) across technical, content, and structure categories
Compare against previous report to show trends
Rank all issues by estimated business impact
Produce a summary report with the top 5 fixes, each with clear next steps

schema-monitor.description: Validates all structured data across the site every Wednesday. Catches schema errors before Google does.

activities.intent: Extract and validate all JSON-LD structured data across the site
steps: Crawl all pages and extract JSON-LD blocks
Validate each schema against Schema.org specifications
Check for required fields, deprecated types, and common mistakes
Flag pages missing structured data that should have it (articles, products, FAQs, local business)
Produce a report with errors, warnings, and recommendations

ai-search-check.description: Monthly check of how your site appears in AI-powered search — Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity.

activities.intent: Test how the site surfaces in AI search results for target keywords
steps: Search target keywords in Google and check for AI Overview citations
Query ChatGPT and Perplexity with questions related to target keywords and check if the site is referenced
Analyze what content is being cited and what is being ignored
Identify content gaps — topics where competitors are cited but you are not
Produce recommendations for improving AI search visibility

new-page-audit.description: Automatically audits any newly published page for on-page SEO issues before it gets indexed.

activities.intent: Run a complete on-page SEO check on the newly published page
steps: Fetch the page and check title tag, meta description, and canonical URL
Analyze heading structure, content length, keyword usage, and internal links
Check all images for alt text, file size, and modern format usage
Validate any structured data on the page
Check page speed and mobile rendering
Produce a quick pass/fail report with specific fixes if needed

competitor-serp.description: Deep SERP comparison against competitors. Shows where you rank, where they outrank you, and what to do about it.

activities.intent: Compare SERP positions for target keywords against competitors
steps: Search each target keyword and record positions for your site and all competitors
Identify keywords where competitors outrank you
Analyze competitor pages that rank higher — content depth, structure, backlinks, freshness
Find keyword gaps — terms competitors rank for that you do not target at all

activities.intent: Produce an actionable competitive SEO report with prioritized opportunities
steps: Rank opportunities by estimated traffic potential and difficulty
For each opportunity, outline the specific content or optimization needed
Identify quick wins — pages that need small improvements to overtake competitors
Produce a prioritized action plan with the top 5 competitive moves
